news_items.headline: Brewers blast Giants, 8-3, behind Kyle Harrison’s dominant start
news_items.summary: ﻿The former Giants lefty struck out 12 in 5.2 innings in an 8-3 Milwaukee Brewers win

news_items.headline: Guardians News: Judgeless Yankees no match for young team
news_items.summary: The Yankees entered Tuesday’s game 3-8 against teams over .500. They did nothing to show they were better than that at home against Cleveland. With the help from some creative argumentative tactics, they came back twice vs Guards SP Joey Cantillo, but they ran out of tricks once he was out of the game. CLE’s […]

news_items.summary: After allowing just one run across his two previous outings combined, Mets right-hander Jonah Tong had a tough night on Tuesday against the Seattle Mariners.

news_items.headline: Angels have Adell's back after flukey defensive play reminiscent of Canseco
Close But No Cigar: Dbacks 5, Dodgers 6
news_items.summary: The Dodgers evened the series on Tuesday night by narrowly beating the Dbacks 6-5. The Dbacks had plenty of runners on base, but were 1 big hit short Tuesday night. Michael Soroka struggled early in this one allowing 2 runs in each of the first 2 innings. He allowed a 2 run HR to Freeman […]

news_items.headline: Mets lose again to the red-hot Mariners
news_items.summary: Carson Benge homered twice, but it wasn’t enough for New York.

news_items.headline: Mark Vientos' inconsistencies at plate, on field take center stage in Mets' loss to Mariners
news_items.summary: Mets first baseman Mark Vientos had a couple of defensive miscues on Tuesday against the Mariners and did not come up big at the plate, showcasing the young slugger's inconsistencies in 2026.
